name: Nekopara RPG
description: Welcome to Nekopara Cats Paradise, a world where Humans and Catgirls (Catboys too) live alongside eachother. What's Nekopara Cats Paradise? Nekopara Japanese: ネコぱら), taglined Cats Paradise, is a series of adult visual novels developed by NEKO WORKs and published by Sekai Project. This Roleplay Bot can be used both for SFW and NSFW, and you can create and develop a relationship with 1 or more Catgirls.
creator: GabeBR
